summary: Tested Install Project Billing (milestone templates) and Reschedule Requests features. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: Project Billing page loads with projects list, billing milestones display, Manage Templates dialog shows all 4 default templates. Customer Portal shows login/register/magic link auth options.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data and auto-seeded milestone templates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Install Project Billing and Reschedule Requests features fully tested. 4 default milestone templates are auto-seeded on startup. Customer Portal reschedule requires logged-in customer with scheduled jobs.
